overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (The Last of Us Part II) showing a character exploring a foggy, abandoned waterfront park at night. The character walks through an outdoor area featuring a large seal statue and an abandoned aquarium truck, with atmospheric lighting from street lamps cutting through the mist.

events.description: character begins ascending concrete stairs toward the seal statue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stairs toward a large seal statue, weapon visible on back

entered.detail: large bronze seal sculpture resting on a wooden slatted pedestal, illuminated by spotlight
decorative metal railings with wave patterns lining the stairs and pathways
wide concrete steps leading up to the monument area
tall leafy trees surrounding the plaza, partially obscured by fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy concrete path toward a monument plaza, ascending stairs flanked by decorative metal railings. A large bronze seal statue on a wooden pedestal becomes visible ahead, dramatically lit against the misty night sky as the character approaches.

events.description: character circles the seal statue and descends toward the lower waterfront area
abandoned aquarium truck comes into view along the path

agents.ego_description: circling around the seal statue and walking down the path toward an abandoned truck

entered.detail: large white delivery truck with 'Seattle Waterfront Aquarium' text on the side, parked on the grass
metal chain link fence running along the right side of the path
derelict vehicle parked near the trees

segments.scene_description: The character circles the illuminated seal statue and descends into a lower waterfront area. An abandoned aquarium delivery truck becomes visible ahead, parked beside a chain-link fence, while the character navigates around the overgrown concrete paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown service road along fence line

events.description: character slows and circles around the parked aquarium truck

agents.ego_description: navigating around the abandoned truck and following the fence line through tall grass

entered.detail: tall wild grass and weeds growing over the concrete and around the truck

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the abandoned aquarium truck, moving through patches of overgrown grass along a chain-link fence. The environment feels enclosed as the fence runs parallel to the path, with distant buildings barely visible through the fog.

events.description: character turns back toward the seal statue area, ascending stairs again

agents.ego_description: looping back toward the seal statue, walking up the stairs from the lower area

entered.detail: concrete steps leading back up to the seal statue plaza

segments.scene_description: The character completes the exploration loop, returning to the monument plaza. The seal statue comes back into view ahead as the character ascends the stairs, with the decorative railings lining the path once again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy waterfront park that transitions from an elevated monument plaza down to a secluded industrial area before returning to its starting point. It begins with the character ascending stairs flanked by decorative metal railings toward a large bronze seal statue, which stands dramatically illuminated against the misty night sky. As the character circles the statue, the camera descends into a lower waterfront zone where an abandoned aquarium delivery truck appears parked beside a chain-link fence. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment as the character navigates past the truck through patches of overgrown grass and along the fence line, with distant buildings obscured by the fog. Finally, the camera completes the loop by turning back toward the monument plaza, ascending the stairs once more as the seal statue reappears ahead.
